$comment: AIF extension manifest (best-effort format as of May 2026). The official extension.json schema is in draft (PR #34 in lee-to/ai-factory). When the schema lands, update this file accordingly. For now, install.sh provides a guaranteed fallback path.
$plugin-packaging: The same shippable set is also packaged as a Claude Code plugin under plugin/ (in-repo marketplace: .claude-plugin/marketplace.json). OpenCode adapter: .opencode/INSTALL.md. The skill/agent paths below are SOURCE paths read by install.sh; the plugin payload mirrors this set (the plugin ships the curated consumer-facing subset).
name: rules-as-tests-aif
description: Rules-as-Tests framework for AI Factory: 5-layer enforcement (architecture, meta-tests, spec-by-example, mutation, living docs) + AI-documentation audit. Server TS + React/Next stacks.
author: rules-as-tests-aif contributors

skills.name: rules-as-tests
skills.description: Convert any codebase rule into an executable test. AI-driven code drift defense.
